library.title: Media library
library.description: Upload images and documents to reference from your campaigns. Limit per file: {{limit}}.

forbidden.title: You do not have access
forbidden.libraryDescription: You need the media:get or media:manage permission to view the library.
forbidden.assetDescription: You need the media:get or media:manage permission to view this asset.

validation.tooLarge: File is too large. The limit is {{limit}}.
validation.typeNotAllowed: Files of type "{{type}}" are not allowed. Allowed: {{allowed}}.

toast.uploadForbidden: You do not have permission to upload media.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this asset?
deleteDialog.description: It will be removed from the library. Campaigns that reference its URL will lose the asset.

detail.notFoundDescription: This asset may have been deleted, or the URL may be wrong.
